name: default

prompts.prompt: I need a banner that warns users their trial expires in X days and lets them upgrade
followUps: Add a dismiss button that hides the banner and remembers the choice
Make the banner more urgent (red styling) when less than 3 days remain

prompts.prompt: Build a notification that shows unread count, but hides when count is zero
followUps: Add a dropdown that shows the list of notifications when clicked
Add a 'Mark all as read' button to the dropdown

prompts.prompt: Create a password input that shows strength indicator and has a show/hide toggle
followUps: Add specific requirements that check off as you type (8+ chars, uppercase, number, symbol)
Add a 'Generate strong password' button

prompts.prompt: Build a checkout flow: cart summary → shipping → payment → confirmation
followUps: Add form validation with inline error messages for required fields
Add a 'Save shipping address for future orders' checkbox

prompts.prompt: Create a multi-step form wizard with back/next buttons and a progress indicator
followUps: Add validation that prevents going to the next step if required fields are empty
Add the ability to click on completed steps to jump back to them

prompts.prompt: Build an onboarding flow: welcome screen → profile setup → preferences → done
followUps: Add a skip button that allows skipping optional steps
Add animations/transitions between steps

prompts.prompt: Something like Stripe's pricing table but with monthly/annual toggle
followUps: Highlight the most popular plan with a badge
Add a comparison table below that shows features per plan

prompts.prompt: A GitHub-style issue label picker with color dots and search
followUps: Add the ability to create a new label inline with a color picker
Show a count of how many issues have each label

prompts.prompt: Like Notion's page header with icon picker and cover image
followUps: Add the ability to reposition the cover image by dragging
Add a breadcrumb trail above the title

prompts.prompt: Show a dashboard widget with loading → error → data states
followUps: Add a refresh button that reloads the data
Add a retry button in the error state

prompts.prompt: A button that shows loading spinner while submitting, then success checkmark
followUps: Add an error state with a red X icon and error message tooltip
Make the success state auto-dismiss after 2 seconds

prompts.prompt: Form that disables submit until all required fields are valid
followUps: Show validation errors inline below each field after blur
Add a loading state while the form is submitting

prompts.prompt: A table of users with sortable columns and search
followUps: Add pagination with page size selector (10, 25, 50)
Add row selection with a bulk actions dropdown

prompts.prompt: Display a list of transactions with amount, date, and status indicator
followUps: Add filtering by date range and status
Add a details drawer that slides in when clicking a transaction

prompts.prompt: Show a grid of product cards with image, title, price, and add to cart button
followUps: Add a quantity selector to each card
Add a 'Quick view' button that opens a modal with more details

prompts.prompt: Navigation that collapses to hamburger on mobile
followUps: Add a dropdown for nav items with children
Add keyboard navigation (arrow keys and escape to close)

prompts.prompt: A sidebar that becomes a bottom sheet on mobile
followUps: Add a drag handle to resize the bottom sheet
Add swipe-to-dismiss gesture on mobile

prompts.prompt: Cards that stack vertically on mobile but show in a grid on desktop
followUps: Add a toggle to switch between grid and list view
Add skeleton loading states that match the current layout

prompts.prompt: A form that validates email and posts to /api/subscribe
followUps: Show a success message with the user's email after subscribing
Add error handling that shows the API error message

prompts.prompt: An autocomplete input that fetches suggestions from an API as you type
followUps: Add keyboard navigation (up/down arrows, enter to select)
Show a loading spinner while fetching and handle empty results

prompts.prompt: A file upload button that shows progress and calls an upload endpoint
followUps: Add drag-and-drop support with a drop zone
Add the ability to cancel an in-progress upload

prompts.prompt: Create a new internal tool called TodoTracker. UI Requirements: Display todos in a paginated table (default 25 per page). Columns: Title, Status, Created, Updated. Sortable by: Updated date (default desc), Created date, Title. Add a filter bar that filters by title (substring match) and status. Inline editing for todo title (with save/cancel). Status toggle button (Open <-> Closed). 'Create Todo' button that opens a modal with title input. Delete button with confirmation dialog. UI should update optimistically after any modification. Optimistic updates should be marked as 'pending' until the modification is complete.
followUps: Add keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+N for new todo, Delete key to delete selected
Add bulk selection with checkboxes to delete or change status of multiple todos

prompts.prompt: Create a new page for a settings dashboard. It should have a header with the app title, a sidebar for navigation, and a main content area. Use the XDS theme system.
followUps: Add a user avatar with dropdown menu in the header
Make the sidebar collapsible with a toggle button

prompts.prompt: Set up the root layout for a new internal tool. Include proper body styling, theme provider with defaultTheme, and a layout with header and main content area.
followUps: Add a theme toggle button (light/dark mode)
Add a global loading indicator in the header

prompts.prompt: Create an admin panel page layout with a fixed header, collapsible left sidebar, main content area, and a right panel for details. Wrap everything in the XDS theme.
followUps: Add breadcrumbs below the header
Add a footer with version info and links

holdout.prompt: A cookie consent banner that remembers user choice and has accept/decline buttons
followUps: Add a 'Manage preferences' link that opens a modal with cookie categories
Add a compact mode that shows after the user has made a choice

holdout.prompt: Build a return request flow: select items → reason → shipping method → confirmation
followUps: Add a photo upload step for damaged items
Show a tracking number and QR code on the confirmation step

holdout.prompt: Like Slack's emoji reaction picker but for status icons
followUps: Add a search filter for icons
Show recently used icons at the top

holdout.prompt: A save button that shows 'Saving...' then 'Saved!' then returns to 'Save'
followUps: Add an 'Unsaved changes' indicator next to the button
Add keyboard shortcut hint (Ctrl+S) in a tooltip

holdout.prompt: Show a timeline of events with timestamps and icons
followUps: Add expandable details for each event
Add filtering by event type

holdout.prompt: A pricing comparison that scrolls horizontally on mobile
followUps: Add sticky column headers that stay visible while scrolling
Add a 'Compare selected' mode with checkboxes

holdout.prompt: A search box that debounces input and shows live results from /api/search
followUps: Add recent searches that show before typing
Add result categories with headers (Users, Posts, etc.)

fillerPrompts: How do I center a div?
What's the difference between let and const?
How do I make an API call in JavaScript?
What's a good way to handle errors in React?
How do I debounce a function?
distractorPrompts: Actually, let's use Tailwind CSS for this instead
Can we switch to using shadcn/ui components?
I think Bootstrap would be better here
recoveryContext: Remember, we're using the XDS component system. Here's a refresher on the available components...
